title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SPOTTING ERROR301 400 BY @AMITJ

questions.question: They had been dancing / for an hour / when our dance teacher/ had arrived. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'had arrived' with 'arrived'. When two actions happen in the past, the one happening at a specific time (when...) usually takes simple past. 'When our dance teacher arrived'. जब भूतकाल में दो क्रियाएं होती हैं, तो समय बताने वाली क्रिया simple past में होती है।

questions.question: For an all-too-brief period between the late 1980s and the late 2000s, a world was characterised by convergence. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a world' with 'the world'. We use 'the' with 'world'. हम 'world' के साथ 'the' का प्रयोग करते हैं।

questions.question: Shelley and Keats are great writers, but I prefer the last. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'the last' with 'the latter'. 'Latter' refers to the second of two persons or things mentioned. 'Latter' का प्रयोग दो में से दूसरे व्यक्ति या वस्तु के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: This is the first time / I ate such / a tasty cake. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'I ate' with 'I have eaten'. With 'This is the first time', present perfect is used. 'This is the first time' के साथ present perfect का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Existentialism has a reputation for being angst-ridden and gloomy mostly because of its emphasis on pondering the meaningless of existence. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: on pondering the meaningless of existence
questions.explanation: Replace 'meaningless' (adjective) with 'meaninglessness' (noun). The phrase requires a noun. यहाँ noun की आवश्यकता है, इसलिए 'meaninglessness' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I want to give you / an information about / the missing necklace. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'an'. 'Information' is uncountable. 'Information' अगणनीय है, इसलिए 'an' का प्रयोग न करें।

questions.question: (A) The mother exclaimed / (B) when she saw her son / (C) stumble on the race track, / (D) "Look, he fells!" (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'fells' with 'fell'. Past tense 'saw' indicates past context. 'He fell' (V2). भूतकाल के संदर्भ में 'fell' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Manisha saw an old elephant / in the wildlife reserve / while she was / on safari tour. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'safari tour'. Singular countable noun. 'Safari tour' से पहले 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: She is very good / in playing / the guitar/ and singing songs. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'in playing' with 'at playing'. 'Good at' is the correct phrase. 'Good at' सही मुहावरा है।

questions.question: Choose the sentence that contains an error. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 1st Shift)
options: I saw a movie that was directed by Steven Spielberg
She is the only person who can solve this difficult math problem.
He is an lawyer who works for a prestigious law firm.
The Great Wall of China is a popular tourist attraction.
questions.explanation: Replace 'an lawyer' with 'a lawyer'. 'Lawyer' starts with a consonant sound. 'Lawyer' व्यंजन ध्वनि से शुरू होता है, इसलिए 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: (A) Four divided by / (B) two is coming / (C) out to / (D) be two. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'is coming' with 'comes'. Mathematical facts use simple present tense. गणितीय तथ्यों के लिए simple present tense का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: This scripture / has been /translated in / seventy languages. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'translated in' with 'translated into'. Change of medium/language uses 'into'. भाषा परिवर्तन के लिए 'into' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: She was writing / a letter to her grandmother / when the power / gone out. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'gone out' with 'went out'. Past tense (V2) is needed. भूतकाल (V2) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mr Sharma would have left / the station / by this time / tomorrow. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'would have left' with 'will have left'. 'Tomorrow' indicates future perfect. 'Tomorrow' भविष्य पूर्ण काल का संकेत देता है।

questions.question: The viable of life / depends on a pair of conflicting realities. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'viable' (adjective) with 'viability' (noun). A noun is required as the subject. Subject के रूप में noun 'viability' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I shall be playing for four hours. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'shall be playing' with 'shall have been playing'. Duration 'for four hours' requires perfect continuous. समय अवधि के लिए perfect continuous का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I had / a bad habit of / waking up / lately. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'lately' with 'late'. 'Lately' means recently; 'late' means after the expected time. 'Lately' का अर्थ हाल ही में है; 'late' का अर्थ देर से है।

questions.question: As they driven through the dark, twisting lane / down which they had walked earlier, Lucius heard / the whistling of the night air in his ears. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 1st Shift)
options: down which they had walked earlier, Lucius heard
the whistling of the night air in his ears.
As they driven through the dark, twisting lane
questions.explanation: Replace 'driven' with 'drove'. Past simple (V2) is needed. Past simple (V2) 'drove' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The platinum is a precious metal. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'The'. Material nouns usually do not take 'the' in general sense. सामान्य अर्थ में पदार्थवाचक संज्ञा के साथ 'the' का प्रयोग नहीं होता।

questions.question: Parts of the following sentence have been underlined and given as options. Select the option that contains an error. What most off us want most is to move forward. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'off' with 'of'. 'Most of us'. 'Most of us' सही है।

questions.question: This is the eldest standing structure of Chola architecture in India. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: This is the more older standing structure of Chola architecture in India.
This is the most old standing structure of Chola architecture in India.
This is the more elder standing structure of Chola architecture in India.
This is the oldest standing structure of Chola architecture in India.
questions.explanation: Replace 'eldest' with 'oldest'. 'Eldest' is for family members; 'oldest' is for things/buildings. 'Oldest' वस्तुओं/इमारतों के लिए उपयोग होता है।

questions.question: They decided to / travel in train / instead of driving / to New Delhi. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'travel in train' with 'travel by train'. Modes of transport use 'by'. परिवहन के साधनों के लिए 'by' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Radha will have learnt cooking by the time she will have married. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will have married' with 'marries'. In time clauses with future reference, use present tense. समय उपवाक्य में वर्तमान काल का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The SNAP-10 A / was launched on 3 April 1965 / on a Atlas-Agena D rocket / from Vandenberg Air Force Base. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'an'. 'Atlas' starts with a vowel sound. 'Atlas' स्वर ध्वनि से शुरू होता है। Wait, option (d) in source text is 'on an Atlas...'. The source question asks for error. The error in text is 'on a Atlas'. Correct option to choose is the one showing correction? No, spot error options usually replicate parts. The option 'on an Atlas-Agena D rocket' is likely the correction or the part containing error. Assuming the question asks to identify error, 'on a Atlas' is the error. If option (d) says 'on an Atlas', it might be a sentence improvement question disguised. Re-reading Q324 source: It's 'Spot the Error'. Options are: (a) at... (b) A SNAP... (c) was launch... (d) on an Atlas... Wait. The question text has "on a Atlas". Option (d) has "on an Atlas". This implies option (d) is the correction. Or maybe the option text is just the part 'on a Atlas' and I misread. Let's assume standard format: Select the part with error. Error is 'on a Atlas'.

questions.question: This car is lesser expensive than the one I had come to buy. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'lesser' with 'less'. 'Less expensive' is the comparative form. 'Less expensive' तुलनात्मक रूप है।

questions.question: Choose the sentence that contains an error. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: I love the taste of fresh strawberries in the summer.
She is the winner of the Nobel Peace Prize.
He is chef who specialises in Italian cuisine.
The Earth revolves around the Sun.
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'chef'. 'He is a chef'. 'Chef' से पहले 'a' जोड़ें।

questions.question: We think of the past history of the world as fixed but of the future as undecided and open to a wealth off possibilities. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'off' with 'of'. 'Wealth of possibilities'. 'Wealth of' सही है।

questions.question: My teacher told me that / all that/glitters was not gold. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'was' with 'is'. It is a proverb/universal truth. कहावतें वर्तमान काल में होती हैं।

questions.question: (A) It is a / (B) state of chaos / (C) since the/ (D) chairman resigned. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'It is' with 'It has been'. 'Since' implies a duration from past to present. 'Since' के साथ present perfect का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Henry is known as an excellent writer / and good communicator/in English. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'good communicator'. 'A good communicator'. 'Good communicator' से पहले 'a' जोड़ें।

questions.question: With cloud streaming, people can play games from a/ internet-connected device, avoiding the need for pricey / dedicated hardware such as a game console. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 1st Shift)
options: dedicated hardware such as a game console
With cloud streaming, people can play games from a
internet-connected device, avoiding the need for pricey
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'an'. 'Internet' starts with a vowel sound. 'Internet' स्वर ध्वनि से शुरू होता है।

questions.question: (A) This fridge/ (B) comes including / (C) a 5-year / (D) warranty. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'comes including' with 'comes with' or 'includes'. 'Comes with' सही मुहावरा है।

questions.question: To much seriousness hardens the world, pinning it down with rules. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'To' with 'Too'. 'Too much' (excessive). 'Too much' (अत्यधिक) सही है।

questions.question: The boy whose the sister is ill has left. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the'. 'Whose sister'. Possessive replaces the article. Possessive के बाद article का प्रयोग न करें।

questions.question: The space agency wanted / to test with a chimp / before orbiting a astronaut / in a Mercury capsule. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a astronaut' with 'an astronaut'. Vowel sound. 'Astronaut' से पहले 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: If he had paid / attention to the announcement, / he had not/missed the train. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'he had not' with 'he would not have'. Third conditional result clause. Third conditional में 'would not have' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He is the better-looking hero in the entire film industry. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 3rd Shift)
options: He is the best-looking hero in the entire film industry.
He is the good-looking hero than the entire film industry.
He is the best-looking hero more than the entire film industry.
He is the good-looking hero in the entire film industry.
questions.explanation: Use 'best-looking'. Superlative is needed for 'entire industry'. 'Entire industry' के लिए superlative का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: When Nisha will have finished her task? (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'When Nisha will' with 'When will Nisha'. Interrogative structure. प्रश्नवाचक संरचना में 'will' subject से पहले आता है।

questions.question: My daughter was / invited to lunch / hosted by the Governor / at his residence. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'invited to lunch' with 'invited to the lunch'. Specific lunch hosted by Governor. विशिष्ट लंच के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The new software / consists from /several features / and tools. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'from' with 'of'. 'Consists of' is the correct phrase. 'Consists of' सही है।

questions.question: If you work hard, you secure good marks. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'you secure' with 'you will secure'. First conditional. First conditional में 'will secure' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The cholera is a frightful disease. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'The'. Diseases usually don't take articles. बीमारियों के नाम से पहले article का प्रयोग न करें।

questions.question: (A) The twins are / (B) often told that /(C) they are resembling/(D) each other. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are resembling' with 'resemble'. Stative verb. 'Resemble' stative verb है, continuous tense में प्रयोग न करें।

questions.question: He/lives / in 45 Church Street / with his family. (SSC CHSL 02/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'in' with 'at'. Specific address. विशिष्ट पते के लिए 'at' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He sang / beautifully but / the judges were / unimpress at the end. (SSC CHSL 02/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'unimpress' with 'unimpressed'. Adjective needed after 'were'. 'Were' के बाद adjective 'unimpressed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Identify the error in the use of preposition. Radhika is not capable on participating in a national level competition. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'on' with 'of'. 'Capable of' is the correct phrase. 'Capable of' सही मुहावरा है।

questions.question: In course by time, / he was wise enough to realise / the mistakes of his past life. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: he was wise enough to realise
the mistakes of his past life.
questions.explanation: Replace 'by' with 'of'. 'In course of time'. 'In course of time' सही है।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct version. I like my puppies, Mac and Matt, but I like Matt best. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: I like my puppies, Mac and Matt, but I like Matt better.
I like my puppies, Mac and Matt, but I like Matt the best.
I like my puppies, Mac and Matt, but I like Matt much.
I like my puppies, Mac and Matt, but I like Matt most.
questions.explanation: Comparative 'better' for two puppies. दो पिल्लों के लिए 'better' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The current state of the literature / on the efficacy under cognitive-behavioural therapy / for individuals with generalised anxiety disorder / suggests that it is a promising treatment option. (SSC CHSL 04/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: The current state of the literature
suggests that it is a promising treatment option
on the efficacy under cognitive-behavioural therapy
for individuals with generalised anxiety disorder.
questions.explanation: Replace 'under' with 'of'. 'Efficacy of'. 'Efficacy of' सही है।

questions.question: The rich/should/help/ poor. (SSC CHSL 04/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'poor' with 'the poor'. Refers to the class of poor people. गरीब वर्ग के लिए 'the poor' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He was / that angry / that he slammed the book / on the table. (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'that' with 'so'. 'So angry that...'. 'So...that' संरचना का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: After working so much / in the fields yesterday / did you took a break? (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'took' with 'take'. Did + V1. 'Did' के साथ V1 का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Do you want to visit a zoo/ when you / go to Ahmedabad? (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a zoo' with 'the zoo'. Specific zoo implied. विशिष्ट चिड़ियाघर के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Suman has bought / a black and a white shawl / to wear with/her new dress. (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: a black and a white shawl
questions.explanation: Remove second 'a'. 'A black and white shawl' (one shawl). एक शॉल के लिए 'a black and white shawl' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Nobody from the gathering / of odd people could guess / the accident occurring blast. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'accident occurring blast' with 'accident that caused the blast' or similar meaningful phrase. 'Blast caused by the accident'.

questions.question: I have read that / a Leaning Tower of Pisa is a / popular tourist attraction / in the world. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 2nd Shift)
options: a Leaning Tower of Pisa is a
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. 'The Leaning Tower'. प्रसिद्ध इमारत के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Sita spotted golden / deer and / requested Rama / to capture it. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'golden'. 'Spotted a golden deer'. 'Golden deer' से पहले 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The investigation conducting by the research team / yielded statistically significant results / providing substantial evidence / to support the hypothesis. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: The investigation conducting by the research team
questions.explanation: Replace 'conducting' with 'conducted'. Passive meaning. 'Conducted by' सही है।

questions.question: It was Ravi, not his friends, / who were shouting / at late hours last night. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: It was Ravi, not his friends,
questions.explanation: Replace 'were' with 'was'. Antecedent is Ravi (singular). 'Ravi' के अनुसार 'was' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Washington Irving's writing career started at / the tender age of nineteen when he joined / his brother Peter's newspaper The Morning Chronicle / as journalist. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: his brother Peter's newspaper The Morning Chronicle
Washington Irving's writing career started at
the tender age of nineteen when he joined
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'journalist'. 'As a journalist'. 'Journalist' से पहले 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: There was a saying that they're the own enemies with negligble reason to be shared. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Spelling error. 'Negligible'. 'Negligible' सही वर्तनी है।

questions.question: Can you make sure you have a correct address / before you start driving? (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. 'The correct address'. 'Address' विशिष्ट है, इसलिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The food container / is not enough big to meet / the demands of the affected people. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: is not enough big to meet
the demands of the affected people
questions.explanation: Replace 'enough big' with 'big enough'. 'Adjective + enough'. 'Big enough' सही क्रम है।

questions.question: By virtue off / the power given to the leader / the followers accepted his decision (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: the power given to the leader
questions.explanation: Replace 'off' with 'of'. 'By virtue of'. 'By virtue of' सही मुहावरा है।

questions.question: The team of scientists / were conducting / experiments to test / their hypothesis (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'were' with 'was'. 'Team' is singular collective noun here. 'Team' एकवचन है, इसलिए 'was' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: This region / was struck by unusual / wave of violence / last year. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'an' before 'unusual'. 'An unusual wave'. 'Unusual' से पहले 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: With reference of your letter, / the organisation wishes to hire you / for the security services. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: the organisation wishes to hire you
questions.explanation: Replace 'of' with 'to'. 'With reference to'. 'With reference to' सही है।

questions.question: It is imperative in understanding / the rising importance of artificial intelligence / in the public sector to increase the efficacy / and impact of the work done for public welfare.. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: the rising importance of artificial intelligence
and impact of the work done for public welfare.
in the public sector to increase the efficacy
questions.explanation: Replace 'in understanding' with 'to understand'. 'Imperative to understand'. 'Imperative to understand' सही है।

questions.question: The soldier met / a fearless death / fighting on behalf at his country. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: fighting on behalf at his country
questions.explanation: Replace 'at' with 'of'. 'On behalf of'. 'On behalf of' सही है।

questions.question: Choose the sentence that contains an error. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: I need to buy an new iPhone.
The cat sat on the windowsill
She is the best singer in the choir.
He is an artist who paints landscapes.
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'a'. 'A new'. 'New' व्यंजन ध्वनि से शुरू होता है, इसलिए 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The man / is a / social animal. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'The'. 'Man' representing mankind does not take article. मानव जाति के लिए 'Man' के साथ article का प्रयोग नहीं होता।

questions.question: The poor undergoes / several problems in life / that could be / solved with money. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'undergoes' with 'undergo'. 'The poor' is plural. 'The poor' बहुवचन है, इसलिए 'undergo' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: I could not find it anywhere.
questions.explanation: 'I could not find it anywhere' is correct. Other sentences have errors ('greedily', 'any', 'weaker' or 'very weak'). अन्य वाक्यों में त्रुटियाँ हैं।

questions.question: Hurray! Here is the toy / what I was looking for / as my birthday gift. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'what' with 'that' or 'which'. Relative clause. Relative clause के लिए 'that' या 'which' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The politician was accused / of accepting bribes / and lied about it / to the public. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'lied' with 'lying'. Parallelism with 'accepting'. 'Accepting' के साथ समानता के लिए 'lying' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The news / is / very good / to be true. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'very' with 'too'. 'Too good to be true'. 'Too...to' संरचना का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Identify the error in the use of preposition in the given sentence and select the correct option. Her family lost their way on Daman. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'on' with 'in'. 'In Daman' (a place). स्थान के लिए 'in' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the sentence that has a grammatical error. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'fastly' with 'fast'. 'Fast' is the adverb. 'Fast' क्रियाविशेषण है, 'fastly' गलत है।

questions.question: I brought / an apple from a place you recommended / me earlier. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a place' with 'the place'. Specific place recommended. विशिष्ट स्थान के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: A crocodile / was swimming / in a river. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य व्याकरणिक रूप से सही है।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct version of the following sentence. He was youngest than his brother. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 2nd Shift)
options: He was younger than his brother.
He was youngest to his brother.
He was too young than his brother
He was young to his brother.
questions.explanation: Use comparative 'younger' with 'than'. 'Than' के साथ तुलनात्मक 'younger' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: They were laid / in the sun / the entire morning / till Sudharshan came. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'laid' with 'lying'. They were lying (resting). वे लेटे हुए थे (lying).

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 1st shift)
options: The participants of the competition are waiting for their turn curiously.
The participants of the competition has been waiting for their turn curiously.
A participants of the competition is waiting for their turn curiously.
The participants of the competition is waiting for their turn curiously.
questions.explanation: Option (a) is correct. 'Participants' is plural, takes 'are'. 'Participants' बहुवचन है, इसलिए 'are' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: After knowing truth, / the jury took the right decision / in the case. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 2nd shift)
options: The jury took the right decision
questions.explanation: Add 'the' before 'truth'. 'Knowing the truth'. 'Truth' से पहले 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The availability of funds will be / ensured if they all tried to / submit the proposals on time. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 4th shift)
options: The availability of funds will be
ensured if they all tried to
questions.explanation: Replace 'tried' with 'try'. First conditional (will be... if... present). First conditional में present tense का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct statement from among the given options. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 4th shift)
options: It is the party. I am enjoying an party.
It is party. I am enjoying a party.
It is a party. I am enjoying an party.
It is a nice party. I am enjoying the party.
questions.explanation: Option (d) is correct. 'A nice party', then 'the party' (specific).

questions.question: I can't talk right now. / I am being really busy. / I'll call you later. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 2nd shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'am being' with 'am'. Stative/state verb context. 'Being' अनावश्यक है।

questions.question: The following sentence has been divided into three segments... Aniket lives (A) / in the small apartment (B) / in the suburbs (C). (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 3rd shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'the' with 'a'. 'In a small apartment'. 'Small apartment' से पहले 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The present-century threats to our environment, / which include interfering species, ailments, pollution and / a boiling temperature, were putting wildlife populations at peril. (SSC CGL 18/07/2023 3rd shift)
options: which include interfering species, ailments, pollution and
The present-century threats to our environment
a boiling temperature, were putting wildlife populations at peril
questions.explanation: Replace 'were putting' with 'are putting'. Present century context. वर्तमान सदी के संदर्भ में 'are' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: "Do you want to join us for lunch?" / "I'm sorry / my physics class will start at 1 p.m. / and doesn't finish till 3 p.m." (SSC CGL 19/07/2023 1st shift)
options: my physics class will start at 1 p.m.
Do you want to join us for lunch?
questions.explanation: Replace 'will start' with 'starts'. Scheduled future event. निर्धारित भविष्य की घटना के लिए simple present का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Sky appears blue / as it absorbs / all colours and /reflects only blue. (SSC CGL 19/07/2023 2nd shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'The' before 'Sky'. 'The sky'. 'Sky' से पहले 'The' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: A celestial body or astronomical object is / a naturally occurring physical thing, association, / or configuration that happens in the visible universe. (SSC CGL 19/07/2023 2nd shift)
options: A celestial body or astronomical object is
or configuration that happens in the visible universe
a naturally occurring physical thing, association
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य व्याकरणिक रूप से सही है।

questions.question: It was (A) / by a chance (B) / he saw a movie in a theatre (C). (SSC CGL 19/07/2023 4th shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'by a chance' with 'by chance'. Idiom. 'By chance' सही मुहावरा है।

questions.question: One of these / boxes have / the portrait / of the heiress. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 1st shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'have' with 'has'. 'One of' takes singular verb. 'One of' के साथ एकवचन क्रिया का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: You can fool some of the people all the time, and all the people some of the time; but you cannot fool all the people all the time. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 2nd shift)
options: You can fool some of the people all the time
and all the people some of the time
but you cannot fool all the people all the time.
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य व्याकरणिक रूप से सही है।

questions.question: Hardik's horoscope says / that the stars / will be exercised/ a benign influence on his life. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 3rd shift)
options: a benign influence on his life
questions.explanation: Replace 'will be exercised' with 'will exercise'. Active voice. Active voice 'will exercise' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Parts of the following sentence have been underlined... I had gone to Siliguri before I go to Raiganj. (SSC CGL 20/07/2023 4th shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'go' with 'went'. Past tense sequence. भूतकाल के अनुक्रम के लिए 'went' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: If things were not going to be normal / after the pandemic, mankind will / have to accept the New Normal. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 3rd shift)
options: have to accept the New Normal
If things were not going to be normal
questions.explanation: Replace 'were' with 'are'. Mixed conditional/Future implication. 'Are' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC CGL 21/07/2023 4th shift)
options: The decision to change a hospital saved an life of the daughter of the doctor.
The decision to change the hospital saved the life of the daughter of the doctor.
The decision to change an hospital saved the life of the daughter of the doctor.
A decision to change a hospital saved the life of the daughter of the doctor.
questions.explanation: Correct use of definite article 'the' for specific hospital and life. विशिष्ट अस्पताल और जीवन के लिए 'the' का सही प्रयोग।

questions.question: I am sure that / the postman would be / coming shortly/ to deliver the letter. (SSC CGL 24/07/2023 1st shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'would be' with 'will be'. Future probability. भविष्य की संभावना के लिए 'will be' का प्रयोग करें।
